title: The Tell-Tale Heart
author: Edgar Allan Poe

beats.name: beat_1
beats.desc: Narrator fixates on old man's eye, decides to kill him.

beats.name: beat_2
beats.desc: Narrator meticulously plans and executes the murder.

beats.name: beat_3
beats.desc: Narrator believes he has successfully hidden the evidence.

beats.name: beat_4
beats.desc: The victim's body decomposes under the bed.

beats.name: beat_5
beats.desc: The victim's vulture eye haunts the narrator with an inescapable sound.

beats.name: beat_6
beats.desc: Police arrive, narrator confesses under pressure.

summary: A narrator with a guilty conscience kills an old man over his eye, then tries to conceal his crime.
